item.title: Amgen Tepezza Formulation
item.description:
• Summary: Amgen is seeking a return to growth for Tepezza (teprotumumab) as a more convenient formulation aces Phase 3 trials for Thyroid Eye Disease. The new formulation aims to improve administration and patient adherence, potentially expanding the drug's market reach.
  • MoAs: Tepezza (teprotumumab) is a monoclonal antibody that binds to insulin-like growth factor-1 receptor (IGF-1R), blocking its activation and downstream signaling, which reduces inflammation, adipogenesis, and fibrosis in Thyroid Eye Disease.
  • Sources: BioSpace
